title: Pusher interface + NoPusher + AppendCommitAndPush
definition_of_done: Pusher interface, NoPusher no-op, AppendCommitAndPush with 4-attempt backoff (1s/2s/4s). Tests: single-branch skips push, dual-branch pushes+resets tracker, all-fail returns error.
outcome: Added Pusher interface, NoPusher no-op, and AppendCommitAndPush with 4-attempt backoff (0s/2s/4s). Tests: single-branch skips push, dual-branch pushes, all-fail returns error. All pass.

notes.msg: Scope overlap with E3 detected at claim time
